title: Every change from Death and Rebirth vs Death TRUE2 listed
display_title: Every change from Death and Rebirth vs Death TRUE2 listed
wikitext:
[]: Every change from Death and Rebirth vs Death (TRUE)2 listed             Quote Post by pen3 » Wed May 07, 2025 3:41 am I found this the other day: https://www.deviantart.com/limbiscuit/art/Death-and-Rebirth-vs-Death-TRUE-2-Comparison-1161018451 Edits made to Evangelion Death (TRUE)2 from Evangelion Death and Rebirth : - Removed the intermission and Rebirth segment (as name indicates). - The two shots of Asuka and Shinji on the deck of the ship are removed. - We do not hear Asuka crying when Rei enters the room during one of the string quartet intermissions. - When Naoko chokes Rei I, the red snapshot of Kaworu is no longer upside down. - Unit 01 holding Kaworuis elongated 30 seconds more as in episode 24. - Credits speed changed. -The Director's Cut scene of Asuka in the bathroom and her mental violation by the Angel is removed. - The closeup of the hanging doll's face is added (originally it used to appear, but during the now removed director's cut scenes). -After Adam appears on the overturned camera a flash appears on the screen before the thermal explosion over the surface of Antarctica. - Added shots of Unit 01 fighting Zeruel. - After Maya gags, added a shot of a piece of the Angel and then Unit 01 coming down and eating it. - Instead of a closeup of Adam's embryo we see a shot of Adam in Commander Ikari's hand from the director's cut episodes as he and Kaji look at Adam's embryo. - When Shinji is staring at the sunset in the lake about to first meet Kaworu, snapshots of other characters are added as flashbacks. - Added camera shake when Shinji reacts to Kaworu's A.T. field. - Redrawn The shot of Shinji noticing Misato when he stands still in the train station. *Death (True) was aired on TV in Japan before being finished and labeled "2" , the changes that at the moment hadn't been implemented yet are in italics.

[]: Re: Every change from Death and Rebirth vs Death (TRUE)2 listed             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu May 22, 2025 9:10 am It's nice to have these differences laid out outside the wiki! Thanks!

Article: Every change from Death and Rebirth vs Death TRUE2 listed
[]: Every change from Death and Rebirth vs Death (TRUE)2 listed             Quote Post by pen3 » Wed May 07, 2025 3:41 am I found this the other day: https://www.deviantart.com/limbiscuit/art/Death-and-Rebirth-vs-Death-TRUE-2-Comparison-1161018451 Edits made to Evangelion Death (TRUE)2 from Evangelion Death and Rebirth : - Removed the intermission and Rebirth segment (as name indicates). - The two shots of Asuka and Shinji on the deck of the ship are removed. - We do not hear Asuka crying when Rei enters the room during one of the string quartet intermissions. - When Naoko chokes Rei I, the red snapshot of Kaworu is no longer upside down. - Unit 01 holding Kaworuis elongated 30 seconds more as in episode 24. - Credits speed changed. -The Director's Cut scene of Asuka in the bathroom and her mental violation by the Angel is removed. - The closeup of the hanging doll's face is added (originally it used to appear, but during the now removed director's cut scenes). -After Adam appears on the overturned camera a flash appears on the screen before the thermal explosion over the surface of Antarctica. - Added shots of Unit 01 fighting Zeruel. - After Maya gags, added a shot of a piece of the Angel and then Unit 01 coming down and eating it. - Instead of a closeup of Adam's embryo we see a shot of Adam in Commander Ikari's hand from the director's cut episodes as he and Kaji look at Adam's embryo. - When Shinji is staring at the sunset in the lake about to first meet Kaworu, snapshots of other characters are added as flashbacks. - Added camera shake when Shinji reacts to Kaworu's A.T. field. - Redrawn The shot of Shinji noticing Misato when he stands still in the train station. *Death (True) was aired on TV in Japan before being finished and labeled "2" , the changes that at the moment hadn't been implemented yet are in italics.

[]: Re: Every change from Death and Rebirth vs Death (TRUE)2 listed             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu May 22, 2025 9:10 am It's nice to have these differences laid out outside the wiki! Thanks
